scenario.name: example-pdf-skill
scenario.prompt:
Read report.pdf from your uploads, summarize it, and write the action items
to outputs/actions.md as a markdown checklist.

artifacts.body:
# Q2 Project Status Report — Action Items

**Summary:** The migration to the new ingest pipeline is on track. End-to-end latency dropped 30% after the caching layer landed, and error rates are within target. The remaining risk is the data-backfill window.

## Action Items

- [ ] **Alice:** Finalize the production rollout plan by June 20.
- [ ] **Bob:** Add monitoring dashboards for the new pipeline.
- [ ] **Carol:** Update the on-call runbook and notify support.
